violations.description: Person in charge. — --Certified food service manager had an expired certificate or is no longer associated with this establishment. Records available during inspection show that the certified food manager's certificate is expired. Facility must have a certified food manager available.

Duties of person in charge. — --Person in charge did not ensure employee compliance with an aspect of the food service operation specified in the food service code. Refried beans found heating in hot hold unit and when employee was asked how long they had to heat them he did not have an answer. Person in charge should assure employees area aware of all food service rules and regulations.

Food supplies. — --Food item obtained from unapproved source. Temperature log was not available for the pork that the facility brings from it's Sioux City location. Log must be available for review during inspection or items must be discarded. **Two gallon bags discarded during inspection.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food was not consumed/discarded within 10 calendar days from the date of preparation. Cooked pork and beef, salsa and guacamole, prepared on site, found in the walk-in cooler were prepared more than 10 days ago. Potentially hazardous foods should be discarded with-in 10 day of preparation. **Items discarded.

Manual cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Equipment/utensil was not air-dried or allowed adequate draining after sanitizing. Observed food employee drying dishes with a towel. Equipment should be allowed to air dry.
Method, clean, temp, concentration, exposure time, equipment/utensils sanitized (4 pts deducted)
Clean dry location, protected (1 pt deducted)
Available, knowledgeable, certified manager (4 pts deducted)
Handwashing, good hygienic practices (5 pts deducted)
Bare hand contact avoided, single- use gloves, and utensils used (3 pts deducted)
Date marking accomplished, discarded (2 pts deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (2 pts deducted)
Handwashing, good hygienic practices (5 pts deducted)
